title: Custom Shield Scale
description: Allows you to customize the shield scale, along with other things like height left/right and more! For both you and others.
body:
**Custom Shield Scale**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- Allows you to change the scale of the shield for you and other players as well as Y and X Y = Height X = left and right 1.20.1 - 1.21.11 ---
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gD9OBTtF/images/aa1e7518d1688024f0cecd5be964517ae1666a9b.gif) _As you can see with this mod the scale is changeable, check the gallery for more!_
--- uses sliders for changing the scale and other settings, Yes this is possible with a pack but this mod allows you to change it exactly how you want live. images/gif showing what each setting does in game Required Mods: [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) If you use 1.20.4 or below try the Java 17 version if your game crashes/doesn't start If you would like to help support the development of this mod - https://ko-fi.com/cutebow Join my Discord for more packs/mods! [![Follow me!](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20me!-💕-pink?style=flat)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow) [![NameMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/namemc-cutebow-ffb6c1?style=flat&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow)
